external_basis.dora_metrics: DORA metrics: delivery performance uses throughput and instability/recovery signals.
external_basis.sre_launch_readiness: Google SRE reliable launches/checklists: launch coordination signs off safe launches and checklists provide action items.
external_basis.user_tracker_requirement: User interruption during WC_STAGE8: tracker should show automatically for every multi-step process.
external_basis.wcag_conformance: WCAG conformance requires satisfying applicable success criteria.

honesty_rule: If rich visual UI cannot be rendered, emit text tracker preview and label limitation.
purpose: Make the operator tracker automatic for every multi-step governed process so Robert does not have to ask for it in each chat.

multi_step_process_detected_when_any: stage has more than one step
stage writes more than one artifact
required_behavior: emit a concise chat-visible tracker preview early
block success if no tracker artifact exists
